description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte olive green polymer stock and handguard, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The stock is skeletonized, reducing weight while maintaining structural integrity, and includes a thumbhole for improved grip and control. The rifle is equipped with a detachable curved box magazine, likely for intermediate cartridges, and standard iron sights with a prominent front post and rear notch. The barrel is relatively short, making the weapon more maneuverable in urban environments, and the muzzle appears to have a flash hider attached. The overall construction suggests a blend of polymer and steel, optimized for durability and ease of handling in close-quarters scenarios.
description: A modern tactical rifle with an olive green skeletonized stock, black metal receiver, short barrel, detachable curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and aligned iron sights.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the skeletonized stock, curved magazine, and full receiver profile.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, rear sight, and magazine curvature.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine release, and overall rifle profile.
